text: The first space feels almost clinical and empty—a world of sharp angles, white walls, and potential escape routes, illuminated by bright artificial lights. I feel small and aware of the silence, as if every footstep would echo meaningfully here. In the second image, colors and text vie for my attention. I am drawn in by the playful yet purposeful design, the juxtaposition of innovation and inquiry. Surrounded by messages of research and development, I sense curiosity awakening within me, eager to decode the meaning of it all. This intersection of sterile hallway and vibrant learning space makes me reflect on the threshold between the unknown and discovery—a liminal state of cautious excitement.
